name: Ben Carson
subject: Thanks for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
| [](https://www.bencarson.com/explore/signup-confirmed/)
---
|
Peter,

I wanted to personally thank you for joining me as I consider the possibility of running for President of the United States.

**Your[**financial support**](https://www.bencarson.com/explore/signup-confirmed/) during the next two months will help me determine whether this is a race I can win, because at this moment, my job is to travel the country to listen and learn from people just like you.**

[**To make a secure contribution to my exploratory committee now, please go here**](https://www.bencarson.com/explore/signup-confirmed/).

In addition to your financial support, I ask for your prayers and feedback. You can reach me via email by [**clicking here**](mailto:info@bencarson.com), and you can also follow me on social media at:

**Facebook:[facebook.com/RealBenCarson](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/26104531:26001888066:m:1:876315805:1cc9715e4c472891c0188bad042f09ef:r)**
**Twitter:[@RealBenCarson](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/26104532:26001888066:m:1:876315805:1cc9715e4c472891c0188bad042f09ef:r)**
**Instagram:[@RealBenCarson](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/26104533:26001888066:m:1:876315805:1cc9715e4c472891c0188bad042f09ef:r)**

Thank you again for your faith in me, and for your faith in this great nation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Ben Carson
subject: This may surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27054108:26004668289:m:1:876315805:AD8515C97DBE3C942C7B9174014D03AC:r)
---
|

Peter,

This may surprise you.

Earlier this week I spoke at a large African-American convention in New York City organized by Rev. Al Sharpton. In the words of _Bloomberg Politics_ , I had entered "hostile territory."

**But as _Bloomberg_ reported afterwards, "the retired neurosurgeon and Republican didn't shy away from his conservative positions."

They are exactly right. **

For example, I told the crowd:

_" We need to talk about stuff we don't talk about, we need to talk about the fact that 73 percent of our babies are born out of wedlock. And that baby is four times as likely to grow up in poverty. Unless we talk about it, nobody else is going to talk about it."_
I also spoke about the benefits of health savings accounts, reforming our entitlement system so that people can move from dependency to a state of independence, and about the importance of protecting traditional marriage in the face of political correctness.

I'm sure many were skeptical of my speech, both before and after. But as noted by the _Christian Post_ , I made a "big impression." I sure hope so.

In my opinion, my message is not a Republican or Democratic message. It is an American message, and exploring a run for President means sharing it with everyone. As conservatives, I believe we must try to persuade every American of every background, particularly those who aren't used to hearing from us.

**Your help thus far has been incredible --[and I ask you for your continued financial support as I travel the country to share my message and determine whether or not this is a race I can win](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27054108:26004668289:m:1:876315805:AD8515C97DBE3C942C7B9174014D03AC:r)**.

Thank you.
Sincerely,
Ben Carson

name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: Hillary set to announce White House bid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend, I need to give you a quick heads up. We're hearing rumors that Hillary Clinton is about to announce that she is running for President this weekend.

We have to fight back.

There are thousands of reasons why this is bad for America, but frankly, you don't have time to read them all, so I'll focus on the most glaring:
1. **8 years of Democrat control have left us with: Obamacare, higher taxes, and unimaginable debt.** We CANNOT allow another 4 years for Hillary.
2. We saw how Hillary handled a crisis abroad during the tragedy in Benghazi. **If you thought President Obama made us weak abroad, Hillary WILL make it even worse.**

The policies of the Obama administration have hurt all of us, but this is our chance to make it right. We cannot do that if Hillary wins, and to beat her, we need you to step up today.
[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1588:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

This isn't going to be easy, **Hillary has amassed an army of donors to raise $1.7 billion to put her in the White House.** That's nearly TWICE as much as President Obama's record breaking totals in 2012... twice as much.

We can fight back, but not without your help, Friend. So, I'm asking you now to get into the ring, to join this fight, and to commit you will do whatever it takes to stop her.

[**And today, all it takes is $5 to show you 're ready to fight back against Hillary in 2016.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1589:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Tomorrow it may take phone calls, next week it may take door knocking or lawn signs, [**but today it takes just $5, and we need you to step up now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1590:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Today is your opportunity, your chance to fight against not just another 4 years of Democrat control, but 4 years of Clinton control.

The only question is, are you willing to do what it takes to stop Hillary? [**If so, all you have to do is give $5 now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1591:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[**Friend, I wouldn 't ask if I didn't know you were up to it. I know I can count on you to help stop Hillary by giving $5 now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1592:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you for your support.

Jeb Bush Jr.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1593:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=155&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Scott
subject: Join us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)[**BECOME A CHARTER MEMBER >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) Peter,

We know that you care about our country as much as we do. We both want the same thing - the best possible place for our children and grandchildren to grow up. And we want to pass along the best America possible to future generations.

This is the reason we started Our American Revival. We are dedicated to restoring American greatness and committed to taking control from the federal government and big government special interests and giving it back to hard-working taxpayers.

[Will you join us as a charter member of Our American Revival?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) You can join at three different membership levels, which each come with a personalized membership card: **Blue:[Contribute: $25 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Red: [Contribute $75 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
White: [Contribute $150 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Your membership will allow us to aggressively fight the big-government policies of the Obama administration. [Will you join us now? ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Governor Scott Walker
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI0NjI0NDMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxMDY0NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
